attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_MTL_ITEM_CATEGORIES.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_ITEM_CATEGORIES.ORGANIZATION_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_ITEM_CATEGORIES.CATEGORY_SET_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_ITEM_CATEGORIES.CATEGORY_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_ITEM_CATEGORIES.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_MTL_ITEM_CATEGORIES.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CG1_MTL_ITEM_CATEGORIES.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_MTL_ITEM_CATEGORIES.CREATED_BY, STG_CG1_MTL_ITEM_CATEGORIES.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CG1_MTL_ITEM_CATEGORIES.REQUEST_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_ITEM_CATEGORIES.PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_ITEM_CATEGORIES.PROGRAM_ID, STG_CG1_MTL_ITEM_CATEGORIES.PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_MTL_ITEM_CATEGORIES.WH_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_MTL_ITEM_CATEGORIES.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_MTL_ITEM_CATEGORIES.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_MTL_ITEM_CATEGORIES.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_MTL_ITEM_CATEGORIES.REFRESH_DATETIME, STG_CG1_MTL_ITEM_CATEGORIES.PROCESSED_FLAG 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_MTL_ITEM_CATEGORIES STG_CG1_MTL_ITEM_CATEGORIES,
 (
 select INVENTORY_ITEM_ID ,ORGANIZATION_ID ,CATEGORY_SET_ID ,CATEGORY_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_MTL_ITEM_CATEGORIES
 minus
 select INVENTORY_ITEM_ID ,ORGANIZATION_ID ,CATEGORY_SET_ID ,CATEGORY_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_MTL_ITEM_CATEGORIES
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = STG_CG1_MTL_ITEM_CATEGORIES.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID and ACM.ORGANIZATION_ID=STG_CG1_MTL_ITEM_CATEGORIES.ORGANIZATION_ID and ACM.CATEGORY_SET_ID=STG_CG1_MTL_ITEM_CATEGORIES.CATEGORY_SET_ID and ACM.CATEGORY_ID=STG_CG1_MTL_ITEM_CATEGORIES.CATEGORY_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_MTL_ITEM_CATEGORIES.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_MTL_ITEM_CATEGORIES)
